case_title: A-L FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JONAS E.D. CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON RAM--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT & APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE PACIFIC CREDIT EXCHANGE SERVED AUG-26-2024, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00- SERVED SEP-04-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D. HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D. HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO ASSIGNEE PACIFIC CREDIT EXCHANGE
ORDER RE: OEX OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERBVICE. NO APPEARANCES.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE PACIFIC CREDIT EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY A-L FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JONAS E.D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT. NOTICE INCLUDES ORIGINAL DATE OF SMALL CLAIMS HEARING WHICH IS OCT-16-2014. (SEE NOTES)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-L FINANCIAL CORP.
